mnemonics: SPNE: Subgame Perfect Nash Equilibrium - 'Solve Perfectly, No Errors' (work backwards through the game tree)
keyPoints: Mechanism Design: Creating rules for a game to achieve a desired outcome (like truth-telling).
Nash Equilibrium: A strategy profile where no player can benefit by unilaterally changing their strategy.
Price of Anarchy: A measure of how efficiency degrades due to selfish behavior of players.
commonMistakes: Assuming players will cooperate for the collective good without proper incentive mechanisms.
Confusing Dominant Strategy Equilibrium with Nash Equilibrium (all DSE are NE, but not all NE are DSE).
Forgetting to check all subgames when verifying a Subgame Perfect Nash Equilibrium (SPNE).
